data: {"generalSituation":"Upper-air disturbances will bring heavy showers and squally thunderstorms to Guangdong today and tomorrow. The trough of low pressure now over central China will develop into a cold front today, and move across the coast of southern China later tomorrow. Under the influence of the northeast monsoon associated with the cold front, showers will ease off over Guangdong and temperatures will fall slightly in the middle and latter parts of this week. Another trough of low pressure is expected to affect southern China during the weekend to early next week. The weather will become unsettled over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260428","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 3 to 4, occasionally force 5 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers and isolated squally thunderstorms.
